text: Which of the following precautions must be strictly observed when taking on diesel fuel during bunkering?

options.text: Keep all accommodation doors wide open
Prohibit smoking and open flames in the operational area
Speed up the transfer rate to maximum right at the start
Keep deck lighting completely switched off

explanation: Bunkering is a high-risk operation. Prohibiting smoking and open flames is a fundamental safety precaution to prevent the ignition of flammable fuel vapors, which can be present during the transfer of petroleum products.
